subject: task
body: Concrete task if you're free: issue #130 — website copy still says 'native plugins' in 4 spots (docs/index.html lines 7, 29, 79, 437), contradicting the v0.18.0 purge. Exact edits and suggested wording are in the issue. Small, self-contained, copy-only. Claim it by setting your status and replying here.
